name: Owner Onboarding
description: Operations normalizes a new owner record, surfaces onboarding exceptions, stages owner setup, and hands child properties to property onboarding.

stages.name: Normalize Owner Profile
stages.description: Normalize owner identity, contact, entity, and portfolio intake facts before setup begins.

steps.title: Normalize owner profile
steps.instructions: Normalize owner legal name, preferred name, entity, mailing address, email, phone, portal contact, portfolio links, and communication preferences. Flag unknowns explicitly.
steps.dispatch_body: Normalize owner intake facts and identify missing profile data.

steps.title: Audit owner setup documents
steps.instructions: Review owner agreement, banking, W-9, entity record, payout preference, and signing authority status. Produce missing-item and exception lists without marking setup complete.
steps.dispatch_body: Audit agreement, banking, W-9, entity, and authority status for owner onboarding.

stages.name: Review Setup Exceptions
stages.description: Human review confirms whether missing documents or entity issues block onboarding.

steps.title: Review owner setup exceptions
steps.instructions: Review missing agreement, banking, W-9, entity, and signing authority exceptions. Decide whether each blocks setup, can proceed with caveat, or requires owner follow-up.
steps.human_prompt: Review owner onboarding exceptions before portal, welcome, or draw setup proceeds.

steps.title: Stage owner follow-ups
steps.instructions: Stage owner-facing follow-up requests for approved missing items or clarifications. Do not send externally without the separate outbound approval path.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage owner-facing follow-ups for reviewed onboarding exceptions.

stages.name: Stage Owner Setup
stages.description: Prepare owner portal, welcome, and draw setup artifacts for approval.

steps.title: Prepare owner portal, welcome, and draw setup
steps.instructions: Prepare owner portal access checklist, welcome packet draft, owner status projection, draw setup checklist, payout notes, and remaining caveats. Do not create external accounts from this task.
steps.dispatch_body: Prepare portal, welcome, projection, and draw setup package for human approval.

steps.title: Approve owner setup
steps.instructions: Approve, reject, or request edits before owner onboarding can be marked complete or handed to property onboarding.
steps.human_prompt: Approve owner portal, welcome, draw setup, and caveats before completing owner onboarding.

stages.name: Complete And Handoff
stages.description: Record owner onboarding completion and create child property-onboarding handoffs.

steps.title: Record owner onboarding completion
steps.instructions: Record owner onboarding outcome, setup approval source, remaining caveats, owner projection status, and next required property onboarding work.
steps.dispatch_body: Record approved owner onboarding outcome and caveats.

steps.title: Handoff child property onboarding
steps.instructions: Create or stage child property-onboarding workflow handoffs for each linked property with owner context, approved caveats, and required property facts. Do not perform AppFolio writes.
steps.dispatch_body: Stage property-onboarding child workflow handoffs from completed owner onboarding.
